subject: [PATCH 1/1] sched/psi: skip irqtime accounting when no new irq time has elapsed

2026-06-17.patch_summary: This patch optimizes the psi_account_irqtime() function by skipping unnecessary accounting when there is no new interrupt time to account for. The function previously only returned early if the delta between the current and previous interrupt times was negative, but not if it was zero. This led to a significant number of unnecessary operations, such as reading the CPU clock and walking the cgroup ancestor chain, which added 0 to every group's PSI_IRQ_FULL counter. By extending the early return condition to also cover the case where the delta is zero, the patch reduces the number of unnecessary operations and improves performance.
